subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Sádiq! The world hath been illumined by the radiant rays of the Sun of Revelation, yet the people of the veil remain heedless thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل صادق از پرتو انوار آفتاب ظهور عالم منور ولکن اهل حجاب از او غافل و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of prayer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
